lines.english: He has returned home, with the Perfect Guru. ||4||12||17||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, Nanak enjoys the Lord's Love.
Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Creator Lord, the Architect of Destiny, I am fulfilled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਨਰ ਜੀਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japat nar jeeve |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the man lives.
All treasures come from the Perfect Divine Guru. ||1||Pause||
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
The faithless cynic dies in shame and misery. ||1||
The wretched, faithless cynic makes only useless efforts. ||2||
The Name of the Lord has become my Protector.
Says Nanak, the humble devotees chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Spreading slander, many have been ruined.
Their necks, heads and feet are tied by death's noose. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੇ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਮ ॥੪॥੧੩॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: taa ke nikatt na aavai jaam |4|13|18|
lines.english: The Messenger of Death does not even approach them. ||4||13||18||
Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House, Dho-Padhay:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਲੁ ਪਲੁ ਨਿਮਖ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pal pal nimakh sadaa har japane |1|
lines.english: Each and every moment and instant, I continually meditate on the Lord. ||1||
What blessed destiny will lead me to meet my God?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਨਿਤ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal prabh ke nit dhiaavau |
lines.english: I meditate continually on the Lotus Feet of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਸਰੁ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਬੇਰੇ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: har naanak bisar na kaahoo bere |2|1|19|
lines.english: that Nanak may never, ever forget You. ||2||1||19||
Please, bless me with such Mercy, O my God,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਮਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਪਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su mat jit preetam paavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: What wisdom will lead me to attain my Beloved? ||1||Pause||
Within my heart, I meditate on the Lotus Feet of God.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
Disease is gone, and I have found total peace. ||1||
The Guru relieved my sufferings, and blessed me with the gift.
My birth has been rendered fruitful, and my life is approved. ||1||Pause||
The Ambrosial Bani of God's Word is the Unspoken Speech.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, the spiritually wise live by meditating on God. ||2||2||20||
Sufferings, sins and afflictions have been dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਉਪਜੇ ਬਾਜੇ ਅਨਹਦ ਤੂਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh upaje baaje anahad toore |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Peace and joy have welled up, and the mystical trumpets of the unstruck sound current vibrate. ||1||Pause||
The Guru, the Perfect True Guru, has blessed me with peace and tranquility.
Guru Nanak has saved my honor. ||2||3||21||
Joining together, O beautiful soul-brides, celebrate and make merry.
Remembering the Lord in meditation, all sinful mistakes have been erased. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਮਤਾ ਮੋਹ ਧ੍ਰੋਹ ਮਦਿ ਮਾਤਾ ਬੰਧਨਿ ਬਾਧਿਆ ਅਤਿ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: mamataa moh dhroh mad maataa bandhan baadhiaa at bikaraal |
lines.english: Intoxicated with the wine of attachment, love of worldly possessions and deceit, and bound in bondage, he is wild and hideous.
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਛਿਜਤ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਕਰਤ ਅਉਧ ਫਾਹੀ ਫਾਥਾ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਜਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: din din chhijat bikaar karat aaudh faahee faathaa jam kai jaal |1|
lines.english: Day by day, his life is winding down; practicing sin and corruption, he is trapped by the noose of Death. ||1||
I seek Your Sanctuary, O God, Merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਮ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਰੀ ਉਧਰਹੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਵਾਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa bikham saagar at bhaaree udharahu saadhoo sang ravaalaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have crossed over the terrible, treacherous, enormous world-ocean, with the dust of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਸਮਰਥ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਤੁਮਰਾ ਮਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: prabh sukhadaate samarath suaamee jeeo pindd sabh tumaraa maal |
lines.english: O God, Giver of peace, All-powerful Lord and Master, my soul, body and all wealth are Yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਕੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟਹੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਦਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ॥੨॥੪॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: bhram ke bandhan kaattahu paramesar naanak ke prabh sadaa kripaal |2|4|22|
lines.english: Please, break my bonds of doubt, O Transcendent Lord, forever Merciful God of Nanak. ||2||4||22||
Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਕੀਆ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਿ ਅਪਣਾ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਸਮੑਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sagal anand keea paramesar apanaa birad samaariaa |
lines.english: The Transcendent Lord has brought bliss to all; He has confirmed His Natural Way.
The True Guru Himself has resolved my affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਹੋਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਾ ਬਿਗਸੇ ਸਭਿ ਪਰਵਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa hoe kirapaalaa bigase sabh paravaariaa |1|
lines.english: He has become Merciful to the humble, holy Saints, and all my relatives blossom forth in joy. ||1||
